title: Bodies Bodies Fix for Create
description: Prevents deployers from spawning corpses (from the bodies bodies mod) when they are destroyed.
body:
Addresses an issue with Create deployers when bodies bodies is installed. (See: [https://github.com/GabrielOlvH/Bodies-Bodies/issues/8](https://github.com/GabrielOlvH/Bodies-Bodies/issues/8))

The items held in the deployer should drop when the deployer is destroyed normally, like they do without the bodies bodies mod.

# Usage
This mod should be installed alongside Create and Bodies! Bodies!. It does not replace Bodies! Bodies!
Client side optional.
